stories.title: Torres Watch — Day 7, Eight Days Left and Still No Answer
stories.angle: D1 Softball Player of the Year Isa Torres (.530 BA / .978 SLG / .591 OBP / 78 runs) enters Day 7 of the 15-day portal window without a commitment. Texas and Texas A&M remain the frontrunners. Eight days remain. The clock is ticking louder.

article.headline: Torres Watch: Day 7, Eight Days Left and Still No Answer

image_concepts.raw:
Torres Watch — Day 7

stories.title: Beachum — Day 7 Uncommitted, No. 1 Transfer Still Building Leverage
stories.angle: Jaysoni Beachum (.417 BA / 16 HR / 66 RBI / .549 OBP) — ranked No. 1 overall transfer by Softball America — enters Day 7 with no commitment. Every day she waits increases her leverage. With eight days left, the window is shrinking but the bidding war is not.

article.headline: Beachum — Day 7 Uncommitted, No. 1 Transfer Still Building Leverage

stories.title: Pickering Enters Portal with "Do Not Contact" Tag — Texas Tech Signals Strong
stories.angle: Oklahoma outfielder Kasidi Pickering (.370 BA / 20 HR / 61 RBI in 2026, On3 No. 2 overall) entered the transfer portal June 8 with a "Do Not Contact" tag — a strong signal she has already chosen her next program. Social media activity and insider reporting point toward Texas Tech, which she publicly celebrated after its WCWS runner-up finish.

article.headline: Pickering's "Do Not Contact" Tag Has Texas Tech Fans Buzzing

image_concepts.label: Image

stories.title: Texas A&M Lands Maddy Azua — Sun Belt Pitcher of the Year Joins Aggies
stories.angle: Maddy Azua, the Sun Belt Conference Pitcher of the Year, has committed to Texas A&M. The left-hander posted a 1.95 ERA with 26-13 record and 244.2 innings pitched in 2025. Azua joins the A&M rotation as the program simultaneously pursues Torres in the portal.

article.headline: Texas A&M Lands Sun Belt Pitcher of the Year Maddy Azua in Transfer Portal

stories.title: Portal Countdown — 8 Days Left, New Entrants and Three Stars Still Available
stories.angle: Day 7 of the 15-day portal window. Committed: Swan (Texas), Plumlee (Alabama), Altmeyer (Texas). Still available: Torres (No. 1, D1 POY), Beachum (No. 3, Softball America), Polar (No. 5, On3). Pickering (No. 2) entered with DNT — appears to have privately committed. Eight days left. June 22.

article.headline: Portal Countdown: 8 Days Left, Pickering's DNT Tag, and Three Stars Still Available
